firstRound.protections: owed to OKC if it lands 17-30 (Nique Clifford draft trade); kept if 1-16
firstRound.note: Modeled as owned in v1: a protected obligation still leaves SAC picking in 2027 if it conveys later.
San Antonio holds unprotected swap rights (De'Aaron Fox trade, Feb 2025). Still counts as a Kings first for Stepien purposes.
